'''Klag''' was a blue skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] who served as the navigator of ''[[Blind Luck]]'', [[Desric Fol]]'s [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Char-stub}}
